shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
echo "Server started, testing..."
# Test without name parameter
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo ""
# Test with name parameter
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"
echo ""
# Test with whitespace in name (should be trimmed)
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo ""
# Test with empty name (whitespace only)
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20%20"
echo ""
# Test with name=World (should not get default)
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=World"
echo ""
# Kill the server
kill %1 2>/dev/null
